properties.name: Brevard Fault Zone
properties.description: Long Appalachian fault zone extending from Alabama through north Georgia and the Carolinas.

properties.name: Eastern Tennessee Seismic Zone
properties.description: One of the most active earthquake zones in the eastern United States.

properties.name: Charleston Seismic Zone
properties.description: Seismic zone near Summerville and Charleston, South Carolina, associated with the 1886 Charleston earthquake.
